goal: backend(Spring Boot Kotlin) + frontend(Vite React) + deploy(Docker Compose) 골격 부트스트랩 + docker compose up 헬스 통과 + CI 초기

steps.name: gradle-root-and-backend-skeleton
steps.summary: gradle 8.7 wrapper(Docker) + spring boot 3.3.4 + kotlin 1.9.25 백엔드 골격, com.mneme 13개 패키지 스캐폴딩, /actuator/health UP 확인

steps.name: frontend-vite-react-skeleton
steps.summary: vite 5 + react 18 + ts 5 + tailwind 3 + vitest 1 스모크 PASSED, build dist 생성, lint/typecheck 통과

steps.name: docker-compose-stack
steps.summary: postgres pgvector/backend/frontend-dev/caddy compose 4서비스 + healthcheck + Caddyfile 검증 통과
